code_body:
u,v:seq CITY   
and the values $\mathsf{u} = \langle$ London,Amsterdam,Madrid $\rangle$ and $\mathsf{v} = \langle$ Paris,Frankfurt $\rangle$ write down the values of the sequences: u v rev(u v) rev u rev v rev v rev u

list_items: 2. Referring to Question 1, find the value of squash $(2\ldots 4\triangleleft$ rev $(\mathsf{u}^{\wedge}\mathsf{v}))$
3. Find the value of squash $(4\ldots 2\triangleleft$ rev $(\mathsf{u}^{\wedge}\mathsf{v}))$
4. Find the value of $\mathsf{u}^{\sim}\mathsf{v}^{\uparrow}$ {London, Moscow, Paris, Rome}
5. Find the value of tail $(\mathsf{u}^{\hat{\mathsf{c}}}\mathsf{v})^{\hat{\mathsf{c}}}.$ front (Moscow, Berlin, Warsaw)

text: 1. 设 Instruments 为乐器的给定集合，Actions 为对乐器施行的动作的集合，并有如下两个定义在给定集合 People、Instruments 和 Actions 上的关系。

code_body:
plays $= = \{(Ligang\mapsto$ piano), (NiJun $\mapsto$ guitar), (DaWei $\mapsto$ violin), (ZhangHua $\mapsto$ trumper), (ZhangYing $\mapsto$ flute), (ZhangYing $\mapsto$ piano), (GaoLei $\mapsto$ piano)}   
worksBy $= = \{($ piano $\mapsto$ hammering), (guitar $\mapsto$ plucking), (harpsichord $\mapsto$ plucking), (trumper $\mapsto$ blowing), (flute $\mapsto$ blowing), (violin $\mapsto$ bowing), (violin $\mapsto$ scraping))

list_items: (1) 分别写出 plays 和 worksBy 的 domain 和 range
(3) 写出 play～以及它的domain 和 range
(4) 写出 worksBy~ 以及它的domain 和 range

text: 2. 用上题中定义的关系 plays 和 worksBy 写出如下定义的每一个关系的内容。
